title: hydrangea macrophylla var. otaksa
intro: Hydrangea macrophylla var. otaksa is a variety of the bigleaf hydrangea plant, commonly known for its vibrant blue flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and digestive problems. The hydrangea's leaves and roots contain anthraquinones and tannins, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, providing relief from conditions such as arthritis and ulcers. Herbal preparations of Hydrangea macrophylla var. otaksa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain, and promote overall health.
